Bitcoin

on Base

Bitcoin on Base offers the scarcity of Bitcoin along with the scalability of the secure, low-cost, and developer-friendly Base chain.

Connect Wallet

Claim

Connect Manually

21 Million Tokens

Like Bitcoin, Bitcoin on Base has a total supply of 21 million tokens. One of the things that’s different about BTCB is that all 21 million are in circulation, aside from the 24.56% of token supply that has already been burned, that is. Bitcoin on Base offers an acceleration of the scarcity that makes Bitcoin so valuable.

Scalable Sound Sovereignty

By existing on the Base chain, interacting with Bitcoin on Base is a seamless and user-friendly process. With Coinbase Smart Wallet, users are able to acquire BTCB directly from their Coinbase exchange accounts. Along with lightning-fast transactions and low fees provided by Base, Bitcoin on Base is accessible to all.

A Platform for Good

Bitcoin on Base is a platform for innovation, forward thinking, community and creativity. Bitcoin on Base stands as a rallying point for a common goal, where together we do more than we can alone. All Bitcoin on Base branding and assets are issued under a CC0 license, which means that it is public domain for anyone to use. Bitcoin on Base is a place to build.
